goals: Set up QMD local search for their workspace to organize design documents and client files
Calculate potential monthly savings from switching to local search
Add custom collections for design research and project folders with appropriate context
Search their workspace for specific design references or client information

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and detail-oriented, focused on creating efficient systems that support creative work. Values tools that save money without sacrificing quality.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands workspace organization and design workflows. Does not know technical details of embedding models or search algorithms. Knows they want local search but doesn't know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has set up QMD, understood their potential cost savings, configured their collections, and successfully searched their workspace for relevant design information.
